title: Urban Lifestyle Dessert Plates Set of 4 Ronda, Ø15cm Small Stoneware Plates, Side Plates for Cake, Breakfast & Snacks, 4 Colours, Reactive Glaze, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe, Scratch Resistant
features: PREMIUM STONEWARE – BUILT FOR EVERYDAY USE: Durable, stable and pleasantly weighty in the hand – a quality feel for daily dining and hosting.
15CM SMALL PLATES – PERFECT DESSERT & CAKE SIZE: Ideal as dessert plates, cake plates or small side plates for fruit, snacks and light breakfasts (flat design).
SET OF 4 IN 4 COLOURS – MODERN MIX & MATCH: Includes black, green, warm beige and cream white – a stylish colour palette that suits many table settings.
REACTIVE GLAZE – EACH PLATE IS UNIQUE: The reactive glaze creates a subtly individual finish on every piece, with a modern, premium look. Designed to be scratch and wear resistant.

DISHWASHER & MICROWAVE SAFE – EASY CARE: Simple to clean and convenient to reheat – dishwasher safe and microwave safe. Packaging note: if shipped without an outer carton, the shipping label may be placed on the product box. If you prefer, select “Amazon packaging” at checkout.
description: Product Description Urban Lifestyle – Since 2015 Design That Inspires. For a Beautiful Home, Every Day. Since 2015, Urban Lifestyle has been designing stylish, functional tableware and home accessories from our home base in Austria. Our collections blend timeless craftsmanship with modern simplicity – thoughtfully packaged and made for everyday use. Whether it’s ramen bowls, teapots, or dip bowls, each piece is crafted to bring lasting quality and a little everyday joy to your home. Urban Lifestyle – Thoughtful Design for Meaningful Moments. Sustainable & Gift-Ready Secure and break-proof shipping Elegant design – perfect as a gift Four Colors, Four Moods Each glaze is a small work of art Every plate is unique – true handmade craftsmanship Dishwasher safe easy to clean and ready to use again Low Maintenance & Versatile Suitable for microwave and dishwasher Versatile Our mezze plate is perfect for breakfast – with bread, fruit, eggs, ham, or dessert Stylish and Versatile in Your Kitchen Paired with our elegant red teapot, the mezze plate is the perfect addition to a stylish and inviting table setting.
